data.body: So much happened last night that I really don't know where to begin, so I am going to go chronologically. I had barely finished making my chicken salad for sandwiches this week when my bf called me to come pick him up from his apartment.
data.author: did:plc:6sn5ipsdnbalrtkjgpjkr3u7

data.body: They went riding. His uncle then tells me, he knows all about our secret relationship. He also told me he knows me and knows I only want what's best for his nephew. And as my bf's father is absent it was up to him to look out for his nephews. He warned me to not hurt him.
data.author: did:plc:6sn5ipsdnbalrtkjgpjkr3u7

data.body: We get to my place and my bf just couldn't wait to show his uncle my house, that he jumped off his bike and ran to my door and unlocked it with his key. His uncle made the comment that it must be serious if you have a key to his house. My bf just blushed.
data.author: did:plc:6sn5ipsdnbalrtkjgpjkr3u7

data.body: except for them being happy that he was finally happy. Anyway, I am happy for him as well. I'm happy his family is accepting. And I am happy to have his uncle's blessing.
data.author: did:plc:6sn5ipsdnbalrtkjgpjkr3u7
